text:
The Panda Frog (パンダガエル, Pandagaeru) is an amphibian species that is a famous Zaban City treat. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 3 (2011) 

Appearance

The Panda Frog is a small frog species with mint green body skin, hunter green colored limbs, webbed feet, and green eyes. It also has circular markings around its eyes and three lines on its back that give it a distinct panda appearance. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

As the Kiriko guide leads Gon, Leorio, and Kurapika to the 287th Hunter Exam site, Gon becomes engrossed by a person in a food booth selling the Zaban City delicacy panda-frog-on-a-stick (パンダガエルの姿焼き, Pandagaeru no Sugata-yaki). 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The Panda Frog is an 2011 anime adaptation exclusive animal.
